monster.name: Kurzum
monster.description: Kurzum is the owner of the *Giavellotto Fantasma*, a weapons shop that also serves as a reference point for those seeking unorthodox jobs. She has hard features, dark calculating eyes, and a thin scar crossing her left eyebrow. She wears a leather apron over a light chain shirt — always ready, even behind the counter. She speaks little and chooses her words with surgical precision. She almost never smiles, and when she does it's worse. She has a habit of cleaning a weapon while talking to customers — a gesture that is never casual. Role: secondary
